acceptance_conditions.label: all R162 source artifacts and hashes remain exact
three profiles and 256 replays are audited
at least one source compare event and one reconstructable event are retained
every source compare event is either reconstructed or explicitly skipped
all four policies emit a code for every reconstructed event
source codes remain valid ordering codes
the declared tie-aware rule is deterministic
the R162 result payload remains bound
the execution is linked to a public preregistration Discussion
forbidden bug, remedy, changed mapping, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: comparison-level arithmetic and tie-policy shadows over hash-bound R162 events
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a changed mapping, production remedy, confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform theorem, hardware performance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
